channel.title: DigiRise India — Blog
channel.description: DigiRise India ka blog — Indian small businesses ke liye digital marketing tips, SEO guides, aur business growth strategies.

item.title: DigiRise India — 8 Software, 1 Agency
item.description: After Effects, Blender 3D, Illustrator, Canva, Meta Ads, SEO, Web Dev — sab ek agency mein, in-house. Real client results ke saath complete breakdown.

item.title: WhatsApp Se Online Business Kaise Shuru Karein?
item.description: Zero investment se ₹30,000-₹1 lakh/month — 12 business ideas, complete setup, templates, 30-day roadmap.

item.title: Meta Ads Kaise Chalayein? 2026 Complete Guide
item.description: ₹300/day se shuru karke 3x ROI — Indian small business ke liye complete Facebook & Instagram Ads guide. Real client data.

item.title: Canva Se Professional Posts Kaise Banayein?
item.description: Free mein Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp ke liye professional posts — zero design experience chahiye. Step-by-step guide 2026.

item.title: Digital Marketing Agency Hire Karein Ya Khud Karein?
item.description: Agency ko ₹25,000 dein ya Canva se khud karein? Honest comparison — cost, time, results. Indian small business ke liye sahi decision.

item.title: WhatsApp Business Se Customers Kaise Banao?
item.description: 30 min mein professional setup — auto-reply, catalog, broadcast sab free. Indian small business ke liye proven strategy.

item.title: Google My Business Free Mein Kaise Setup Karein?
item.description: 30 minute mein Google Maps pe apna business daalo — bilkul free. Kirana, salon, clinic — sab ke liye step-by-step guide.

item.title: Website Banwane Ka Kitna Kharcha Aata Hai?
item.description: ₹7,999 se ₹74,999 tak — India ke small business owners ke liye honest website pricing guide. Real data, no jargon.
